catalyst.event: Marvel Mystic Mayhem (漫威秘法狂潮) global launch and Q4 2025 / FY2025 earnings release — first quarter to fully reflect Where Winds Meet (燕云十六声) PC/mobile mature monetization plus Marvel IP launch contribution; management guidance on 2026 pipeline (Destiny: Rising, FragPunk console, Ananta) will be issued.
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-02-20 (±10 days, FY2025 results) and Marvel Mystic Mayhem global launch window 1H 2026
catalyst.source: NetEase IR calendar; company prior earnings cadence; gaming pipeline announcements at ChinaJoy 2025 and TGS 2025

rightIf_conditions: Q4 2025 / FY2025 (reported Feb 2026) gaming revenue grows ≥12% YoY AND gaming GPM ≥68.5%
Where Winds Meet mobile remains iOS top-10 grossing in China through Mar 2026
Marvel Mystic Mayhem launches by Jun 2026 with ≥$50M first-month gross bookings (Sensor Tower observable)
FY2026 consensus EPS revised up by ≥8% within 90 days of Feb 2026 earnings
wrongIf_conditions: Q4 2025 gaming GPM falls below 67% (signals monetization model erosion)
Where Winds Meet mobile drops out of iOS top-20 grossing for 8+ consecutive weeks
Regulatory body (NPPA) freezes new monetization approvals or reintroduces 2023-style draft minor-spending caps
Marvel Mystic Mayhem launch slips beyond Sep 2026 OR achieves <$20M first-month bookings
what_changes_our_mind: Q4 2025 results show gaming GPM falling below 67% AND Where Winds Meet mobile dropping out of iOS top-15 grossing for 8+ consecutive weeks before March 2026 — would indicate monetization peak passed and pipeline cannot offset legacy decay.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes NetEase delivers smoothed mid-teens earnings growth → We believe FY2026 sees a non-linear earnings step-up from compressed catalyst density → Mechanism is Where Winds Meet deferred revenue recognition + Marvel/Destiny:Rising launches landing in overlapping quarters, forcing +10-15% EPS revisions.
time_to_resolution: 12 months — first signal at Feb 2026 FY2025 earnings; full resolution by Q3 2026 results

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +30% to +45% (re-rate from 14.5x to 17x forward P/E + 10% EPS upgrade)

quantification.metric_target: FY2025 EPS and FY2026 gaming revenue growth
quantification.current_value: Consensus FY2025 EPS RMB ~8.6; FY2026 gaming rev growth ~8-10%
quantification.predicted_value: FY2025 EPS RMB 9.4-9.8 (8-12% beat); FY2026 gaming rev growth 14-17%
